prestazioni: Engine swap to a **VQ30DET** (3.0L twin-turbo V6, 300+ hp stock) with a **Garrett GT3582R** turbocharger (82mm compressor, 62mm turbine) paired with a **Tomei 264°/10.5mm lift** camshaft set for high-RPM power, retaining the stock **N1 block** for durability under boost.

Full **HKS Hi-Power 4-2-1 stainless steel exhaust manifold** with **3.5-inch titanium-wrapped downpipe** and **SARD 76mm wastegate** (external, dual-port) to eliminate backpressure, coupled with a **GReddy Profec B Spec II** boost controller for precise turbo spool management.

Custom **Nismo 555cc/min high-impedance fuel injectors** (replacing the stock 370cc units) fed by a **Walbro 450 LPH in-tank fuel pump**, with a **HKS Fuel Cut Defenser** to prevent fuel starvation at high RPM, and a **Link G4+ Xtreme ECU** tuned on a **Dynapack hub dyno** for 450 whp on **100-octane race fuel**.

Strengthened drivetrain with a **Nismo 2-way limited-slip differential (LSD)** (25-spline, 1.5-way preload), **OS Giken 1.5-way clutch** (triple-plate, 800 kgf clamping force), and **Nissan Competition 5-speed manual transmission** (from the Y33 GT-R, reinforced synchros) with a **PPG straight-cut gear set (2.3:1 final drive)** for drag strip launches.
estetica: **Vertex Lang II** widebody kit (Y33-specific, bolt-on fenders with 50mm flares) paired with a **C-West GT-1 front bumper** (carbon fiber, 3-piece splitter) and **Veilside Fortune rear bumper** (custom-fabricated to fit Y33 chassis, dual diffuser tunnels).

**Work Meister S1 3P 18x10.5 +25** wheels (ET25, 5x114.3) wrapped in **Yokohama Advan A052 275/35/18** tires, with **Tein Mono Flex Z coilovers** (8kg/mm front, 6kg/mm rear springs, 32-way damping adjustability) and **Nismo 4-piston front/2-piston rear brake calipers** (320mm rotors, slotted).

**RE Amemiya GT-II** carbon fiber hood (dual NACA ducts, 50% weight reduction) with **Seibon carbon fiber trunk** (custom one-piece, no spoiler), **JUN rear wing** (3D adjustable, 1,200mm span, CFRP construction), and **GReddy E-Mange gauge pod** (integrated into A-pillar, housing **Defi BF gauges** for oil pressure, boost, and EGT).
